All activation patching experiments were implemented using the NNsight library (version 0.3).
We import nnsight and use nnsight.trace() to hook into intermediate layers of the model.
The following code illustrates our approach:

  from nnsight import LanguageModel
  model = LanguageModel("meta-llama/Llama-3-8b")
  with model.trace("The Eiffel Tower is in") as tracer:
      hidden = model.model.layers[12].output[0].save()
